Test Description: Validates default reset values for the MIZAR_GPIO addresses in addr_array by comparing (read_reg(addr) & 0xFFFFFFFE) to default_value_array[i], then verifies masked write/read behavior by writing patterns (0xFFFFFFFF,0xAAAAAAAA,0x55555555,0xF5F5F5F5,0xA5A5A5A5,0xFFFF0000) with write_mask_array[i] and reading back with read_mask_array[i]; errors increment def_fail_cnt/wr_fail_cnt and final result is reported via finish(0/1).
Remarks: 80,94,98,9c,a0,a4,a8,ac,b0...SKIPPING VRRW registers when reading default values the din value is becoming 1 automatically if we don't force any value,but if we force zero to din bit level sel becoming high,so that reding value not matched with expected value
Test Steps/Procedure:
- Default value check (chk_rst_val): iterate i=0..CNT-1 over addr_array; skip if skip_rst_array[i]==1 or if read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000; perform data_rd=read_reg(addr) then data=(data_rd & 0xFFFFFFFE); compare data to default_value_array[i]; on mismatch, increment def_fail_cnt and printf failure details; on match, optional DEBUG_DISPLAY PASS print.
- Write & read check (chk_rd_wr): for each data_wr in {0xFFFFFFFF,0xAAAAAAAA,0x55555555,0xF5F5F5F5,0xA5A5A5A5,0xFFFF0000}, write phase: for each i, set addr=addr_array[i]; skip if skip_array[i]==1 or write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000; write_reg(addr, (data_wr & write_mask_array[i])); readback phase: for each i, skip if skip_array[i]==1 or write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 or read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000; compute data_rd=(read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i]); compute wr_n=(write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xFFFFFFFF); compute expected exp_val=((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); if data_rd==exp_val then optional DEBUG_DISPLAY PASS print else increment wr_fail_cnt and printf failure details.
- Test harness (test_case): call chk_rst_val(); call chk_rd_wr(); if (def_fail_cnt>0 || wr_fail_cnt>0) then finish(1) else finish(0).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria:
- Default value acceptance: for each non-skipped, readable address, (read_reg(addr) & 0xFFFFFFFE) must equal default_value_array[i]; mismatches increment def_fail_cnt and print failure lines.
- Write/read acceptance: for each non-skipped address and each pattern, with data_rd=(read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i]) and wr_n=(write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xFFFFFFFF), data_rd must equal exp_val=((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); mismatches increment wr_fail_cnt and print failure lines.
- Overall pass criterion: def_fail_cnt==0 and wr_fail_cnt==0 leading to finish(0); any failure leads to finish(1).
